Google and Koo have filed their compliance report as per the requirement under the new IT rules - which came into effect on May 26. As per the new IT law, large social media companies need to publish periodic compliance reports every month, mentioning the details of complaints received and action taken. 

More to know

Koo, has filed its compliance report for the month of June 2021. The company in its report states that it will publish the report on the first day of each month, and it will be available on the public platform. 96 per cent of the complainants received by Google were related to copyright. The company acted on 59,350 requests raised by users during the period, a majority of which again were related to copyright infringement.

~The spread operator is used to replace certain array functions. The spread operator is simply a series of three dots.

The Future of Brighton R

WHY ANGULAR ? pt 1

The strong sides of Angular include:

芒聳芦茂赂聫Detailed documentation. 
Angular boasts detailed documentation where developers can find all necessary information without asking their colleagues. As a result, developers can quickly come up with technical solutions and resolve emerging issues. 

芒聳芦茂赂聫Support by Google. 
A lot of developers consider Google support another benefit of Angular, making the platform trustworthy. At ng-conf 2017, the developers of Angular confirmed that Google will support Angular on a long-term basis.

芒聳芦茂赂聫Great ecosystem of third-party components. 
The popularity of Angular has resulted in the appearance of thousands of additional tools and components that can be used in Angular apps. As a result, you can get additional functionality and productivity improvements.
Component-based architecture. In the second version, Angular shifted from an MVC to a component-based architecture. According to this architecture, an app is divided into independent logical and functional components. These components can easily be replaced and decoupled as well as reused in other parts of an app. In addition, component independence makes it easy to test a web app and ensure that every component works seamlessly.

Every single business needs some kind of chart from time to time. I have reviewed a lot of dashboard, reports and here are a few tips that can make a huge impact on the way you present data and how you design products.
-
No more than 6 slices of pie
Which one shows more meaningful story?
-
Use clear colors
Some charting libraries generate very similar colors. Make sure that data are represented fairly by dedicated color for every data set.
-
Trend lines are distraction
They don't add any value to the chart and create a useless distraction for the user.
-
3D? The chart is not an action game
Unless you are in VR environment, it is not a good idea to use 3D. It adds unnecessary cognitive load.

In computer science, a sorting algorithm is an algorithm that puts elements of a list in a certain order. The most frequently used orders are numerical order and lexicographical order.

Efficient sorting is important for optimizing the efficiency of other algorithms (such as search and merge algorithms) that require input data to be in sorted lists. Sorting is also often useful for canonicalizing data and for producing human-readable output.

Google Cloud Platform Components & Services

Google Cloud resources
Google Cloud consists of a set of physical assets, such as computers and hard disk drives, and virtual resources, such as virtual machines (VMs), that are contained in Google's data centers around the globe. Each data center location is in a region. Regions are available in Asia, Australia, Europe, North America, and South America. Each region is a collection of zones, which are isolated from each other within the region. Each zone is identified by a name that combines a letter identifier with the name of the region. For example, zone a in the East Asia region is named asia-east1-a.
This distribution of resources provides several benefits, including redundancy in case of failure and reduced latency by locating resources closer to clients. This distribution also introduces some rules about how resources can be used together.

Accessing resources through services
In cloud computing, what you might be used to thinking of as software and hardware products, become services. These services provide access to the underlying resources. The list of available Google Cloud services is long, and it keeps growing. When you develop your website or application on Google Cloud, you mix and match these services into combinations that provide the infrastructure you need, and then add your code to enable the scenarios you want to build.

TikTok has fixed security bugs which allowed the theft of private user information! Earlier this year, TikTok launched a bug bounty program after the discovery of vulnerabilities and threats of a ban by the former Trump administration. That effort appears to have paid dividends, as it recently fixed a serious flaw discovered by the security firm Check Point Research. The vulnerability would have allowed attackers to use the app芒聙聶s 芒聙聹Friend Finder芒聙聺 feature to steal users芒聙聶 profile details and phone numbers, then build a database of information that could be used for malicious attacks. Check Point researchers developed an exploit after noticing a flaw in the way TikTok芒聙聶s servers confirmed that Friend Finder requests were coming from legitimate phones. Using a unique device ID for each user芒聙聶s phone, the app creates a user token and session cookie. However, the team found that the cookies were valid for up to 60 days, allowing them to be used in virtual devices instead of physical phones. Using some hacking tools, they could bypass TikTok芒聙聶s HTTP message signing, change the function to acquire contacts and re-sign the request. Because all this was done in a virtual device, the process could be automated. That let researchers build a database of user phone numbers, nicknames, profile and avatar pictures, unique user IDs and settings such as whether a user is a follower or if a user芒聙聶s profile is hidden. A previous Facebook flaw provides a good example of how such an exploit can be used. Cybercriminals were able to scrape numerous phone numbers entered by Facebook users that were meant to be private and built up a database of up to 500 million users. DSI Drones. A drone video surveillance system 
Observe territories using drones as your eyes, for military or control purposes. Break territories into zones and assign a drone to each one. Place a Control Tower in the middle of each territory. Place operators anywhere. They watch a stream from any drone in a web app.

冒聼聯禄 Video and radio streaming on TV and radio frequencies
Some territories are big, and Wi-Fi can芒聙聶t naturally cover the whole area, so it芒聙聶s impossible to watch the feed. We send video and audio from drones via TV transmitters. The signal comes to the field computer, a retranslator on the Control Tower of the territory.
冒聼聯隆 Video and audio digitization
Since PCs don芒聙聶t understand TV and radio signals, we set a TV tuner. It helps the computer read the signal.
冒聼聭篓芒聙聧冒聼聮禄 Operators watch and interpret video
In the Control Center, video and audio go to a web interface. Operators watch it for threats in real time.
冒聼聲鹿 Multichannel observation gives full control
Watch drones move in real-time. Watch video feed from the drones, track 2 or more alerts simultaneously. Monitor the drone battery level and weather conditions. You can do it separately or together, as the screen adjusts to the amount of windows.
冒聼聰聧 Video recognition
A third-party video recognition system is integrated into DSI Drones. If a drone detects a suspicious object, it sends an alarm signal to operators.
冒聼職芦 Instant notifications for threats
The alarm immediately shows up in the Control Center. Operators can either start tracking the threat or hide the alarm. If they decide on the latter, the drone will continue monitoring the potential threat. If the threat is confirmed, the operator gets a notification again.
芒聫虏 Alarm log
Alarms are stored in a log. Operators can access it, filter by the type of a detected object or a data range. The system stores video and pictures connected to the alarms.

But instead of being overwhelmed all day, it's better to focus on a basic concept and use it as a foundation to start progressing. 冒聼聶聦

冒聼聮隆 Focus on the basics.
Tech really looks endless, but each subject has it's basics. If you are really interested in a certain subject, try to go back to the basics. Not only in tech though, try to enjoy the little things in life too. A refreshing walk, a short talk, a funny event or anything happening around you. Live in the moment, we can't predict the future, but we can create the future. 冒聼聵聡 We can only create the future best when we are having joy.

Every single business needs some kind of chart from time to time. I have reviewed a lot of dashboard, reports and here are a few tips that can make a huge impact on the way you present data and how you design products.
-
No more than 6 slices of pie
Which one shows more meaningful story?
-
Use clear colors
Some charting libraries generate very similar colors. Make sure that data are represented fairly by dedicated color for every data set.
-
Trend lines are distraction
They don't add any value to the chart and create a useless distraction for the user.
-
3D? The chart is not an action game
Unless you are in VR environment, it is not a good idea to use 3D. It adds unnecessary cognitive load.

multiple studies have found a strong link between heavy social media and an increased risk for depression, anxiety, loneliness, self-harm, and even suicidal thoughts.
Social media may promote negative experiences such as:

Inadequacy about your life or appearance. Even if you know that images you芒聙聶re viewing on social media are manipulated, they can still make you feel insecure about how you look or what芒聙聶s going on in your own life. Similarly, we芒聙聶re all aware that other people tend to share just the highlights of their lives, rarely the low points that everyone experiences. But that doesn芒聙聶t lessen those feelings of envy and dissatisfaction.

Fear of missing out (FOMO). While FOMO has been around far longer than social media, sites such as Facebook and Instagram seem to exacerbate feelings that others are having more fun or living better lives than you are.

Isolation. A study at the University of Pennsylvania found that high usage of Facebook, Snapchat, and Instagram increases rather decreases feelings of loneliness

New Portfolio Out.脗聽yitingliu.com 

For this new portfolio, I spent three weeks building it using Jekyll to make my portfolio easy to manage in the future. In the process, I got to know Gem, Liquid, Jekyll. It is magnificent how one line of code can change all other pages.

To write in markdown is fun, but my cheat is to use Notion to create the outline and export it into a markdown file. Makes my life so much easier!

Since the pandemic started in March 2020, I created my first ever portfolio (swipe to see) from scratch using pure javascript, HTML, and CSS in 3 months. I was super proud of myself. After presenting my old portfolio to tons of friends and professionals, I decided to minimize the content in my new portfolio.

So here are some improvements:

* A showreel for projects at the top

* Two nav links for easier navigation

* Faster loading with reduce-sized assets

There are some features in my older portfolio I want to incorporate in my new ones such as filters, experiments. Feel free to tell me how you feel when exploring the website. I really appreciate it!

I am proud of the growth in me to explore more in the web development world and in myself.
If you have any questions to get started in Jekyll, feel free to reach out. We can always learn together!脗聽

I am so fortunate to be in @itp_nyu to have met amazing people that encourage/inspire me to be stronger and more confident in my ability to explore anything I want.脗聽

Thank you and love you!
